headline: Sandisk (SNDK) Surges 6.9% as Investors Take Advantage of Bloodbath
summary: Sandisk Corp. (NASDAQ:SNDK) is one of the 10 Must-Watch Stocks Right Now. Sandisk jumped by 6.92 percent on Friday to finish at $661.62 apiece, as investors took advantage of the broader market bloodbath to hunt for bargains in AI stocks. During the session, Sandisk Corp. (NASDAQ:SNDK) rallied alongside its counterparts in the storage sector, namely […]
